technical_skills.title: Technical Skills
technical_skills.programming_principles_desc: Algorithms and data structures, space and computational complexity, programming paradigms (concurrent, declarative, functional, imperative, reactive, object oriented), software engineering design patterns, symbolic AI and various machine learning methods.
technical_skills.system_programming_desc: Linux API, Bash, Python, C, C++, Java, Javascript, Typescript, Rust, Go, various build systems (CMake, Make, Maven, Gradle, Cargo, Poetry, Npm, Pnpm).
technical_skills.web_frameworks_desc: Angular, Next.js, Nuxt, Express, Django, FastAPI, Ruby on Rails.
technical_skills.frontend_web_desc: Angular, React, Vue, Bootstrap, JQuery, Tailwind.
technical_skills.frontend_mobile_desktop_desc: Android SDK, Google Play Services, Flutter, Cordova, React Native, Gtk, Qt, Gnome SDK.
technical_skills.databases_desc: Firebase, Supabase, MongoDB, MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQLite.
technical_skills.devops_desc: AWS (VPC, EC2, ECS, Fargate, S3, RDS, Route 53, CloudFront, Lambda, API Gateway, IAM, CloudWatch, SNS, SQS, CodePipeline, CodeBuild, CodeDeploy, CloudFormation, Node SDK), Azure, Docker, Git, GitHub Actions, Nginx, SSH, SSL, GnuPG.
technical_skills.data_science_desc: Jupyter, MatPlotLib, NumPy, PyTorch, Pandas, SciPy.
technical_skills.embedded_desc: I have experience with various development boards such as Arduino Uno, Raspberry Pi, ESP32 based systems, with which I design and manufacture 3d-printed IoT solutions integrating them with electronic components and deploying them in computer networks with protocols such as TCP/IP, WiFi, BLE, Zigbee, MQTT. I'm also interested in computer architectures, with particular regard to data and compute parallelism.
technical_skills.multimedia_software_desc: FreeCAD, KiCAD, Blender, Cairo, Ffmpeg, Gimp, Inkscape, Imagemagick, Latex, Pandoc, Godot, Neovim, Code OSS, Ardour, OBS Studio, Audacity.
